action.reasoning: Observation: trained full replay (all images) linear classifier for 10 epochs/task, val acc 0.7510 at task 9, best val 0.7510 earlier (likely at task 8 or 9). Analysis: This approach may significantly outperform previous NME and limited replay (0.4655 test). Need test score to gauge performance. Decision: submit eval immediately to get test accuracy; then scale epochs if needed and time permits.
